enrichment.top_upsell_reason: Bundle with Revit, Civil 3D, Navisworks for full AEC workflow
enrichment.all_upsells: AEC Collection; AutoCAD (full); Fusion Mfg Ext

homepage.title: S+C | Stainless Steel Solutions by Schmidt + Clemens since 1879: Schmidt+Clemens
homepage.description: Schmidt + Clemens supplies stainless steel components for petrochemicals, energy & industry. Innovation, quality & sustainability for 145 years.

The Schmidt + Clemens Group
Schmidt + Clemens – Innovation from tradition
Precision in centrifugal casting, static casting and investment casting for 145 years
Schmidt + Clemens is more than just a specialized foundry – we are leading global experts in centrifugal casting, static casting and investment casting. With in-depth metallurgical knowledge and 145 years of experience, we develop innovative solutions that contribute to a more sustainable use of our planet´s resources.
With passion, innovation, and a clear focus on quality, we develop customized products in close collaboration with our customers. Our motivation is to work with you to overcome the challenges of tomorrow and shape sustainable progress.
As a stainless steel specialist, we offer the full range of foundry technologies – from
centrifugal casting
and
static casting
investment casting
. We manufacture precision components that withstand the highest stresses.

Petrochemicals products
Innovation and quality for the petrochemicals industry
Schmidt + Clemens
is known throughout the world for high-quality components and systems. Whether it’s
steam crackers
steam reformers
, the products of this global family business have been setting standards in the petrochemicals industry for over 145 years. Together with our customers, we’re shaping a more sustainable future! State-of-the-art products and innovative materials enable us to significantly reduce the carbon footprint without compromising on performance.
